comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Code Simplifier Review**: Default parameter value on exclude_labels - Dignified Python forbids default parameter values. Use keyword-only argument with *. - See dignified-python-core.md

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Already addressed in commit 3b2679b8c (remove default value from exclude_labels fields).

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Test Coverage**: New private method `_enrich_prs_via_graphql()` lacks corresponding tests. This method contains significant GraphQL query building and response parsing logic that should be covered by unit tests.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Added 5 tests in test_real_github_pr_enrichment.py covering _enrich_prs_via_graphql: single PR, multiple PRs, command failure, empty list, partial response (6b32037)

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 06:29 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Test Coverage**: New private method `_merge_rest_graphql_pr_data()` lacks corresponding tests. This method performs critical data transformation between REST and GraphQL responses and should be covered by unit tests.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Added 7 tests in test_real_github_pr_enrichment.py covering _merge_rest_graphql_pr_data: single PR, missing enrichment, multiple PRs, labels, timestamps, review threads, empty items (6b32037)

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 06:30 PST_
